title: Origins+
description: Adds new origins to the Origins mod.
body:
![Origins Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lochnessdragon/OriginsPlus/main/branding/origins-plus-logo.png)

# Origins+
Adds new origins to the origins mod.

[![Source Link](https://img.shields.io/badge/Contribute%20on-Github-green?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/lochnessdragon/OriginsPlus)
[![Requires Fabric API](https://img.shields.io/badge/Requires-Fabric%20API-blue?style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
[![Requires Origins](https://img.shields.io/badge/Requires-Origins-blue?style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins)
[![Requires Pehkui](https://img.shields.io/badge/Requires-Pehkui-blue?style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)
[![Wiki Link](https://img.shields.io/badge/Need%20Help%3F-Wiki!-orange?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/lochnessdragon/OriginsPlus/wiki)

<details open>
<summary>Required Mods</summary>

* [Origins v 1.8.1+](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins)
* [Pehkui v 3.7.0+](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)
* [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

</details>

## Additional Origins
### Creeper:

| Pros                                   | Cons                                                                       |
|-------------------------|-----------------------------------------------|
| You can explode at will. | Your skin is green *ewww.....*                           |
| Creepers will avoid you. | A cat's presence will damage you over time. |

![Another Origin Follows](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lochnessdragon/OriginsPlus/main/branding/separator.png)

### Dwarf:

| Pros                                   | Cons                                                                       |
|-------------------------|-----------------------------------------------|
| You are *25%* smaller. | You can't see when exposed to the sun without proper eye protection. |
| You can mine faster and get extra ores. | Your mining ability causes you to get hungry much quicker. |
| You have a small amount of nightvision. | |
| You can break stone blocks with your bare hands. |

![Another Origin Follows](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lochnessdragon/OriginsPlus/main/branding/separator.png)

### Monke:

| Pros | Cons|
|------------|-----------|
| You can grapple to any block. | You have to sleep above Y-level 25 or on top of leaves. |
|  | You can only eat vegetables. | 
|  | Water damages you. |

![Another Origin Follows](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lochnessdragon/OriginsPlus/main/branding/separator.png)

### Snowman:

| Pros | Cons |
|------|------|
| You can turn water into a thin sheet of ice. | Fire does **2x** damage. |
| You get a speed boost on ice. | You take more damage in the nether if you aren't standing on ice or in a cauldron. |
| Your snowballs do more damage. | |

![Another Origin Follows](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lochnessdragon/OriginsPlus/main/branding/separator.png)

### Wyvern:

| Pros | Cons|
|------------|------------|
| You can shoot fireballs. | You start in the Nether. |
| You are immune to fire. | Snowballs do more damage to you. |
| | You can only eat meat. |
| | You are damaged by water. |

![Another Origin Follows](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lochnessdragon/OriginsPlus/main/branding/separator.png)

### Zombiefied:

| Pros | Cons |
|-----------|---------|
| You have some base armor. | You can't sleep and prevent others from sleeping. However, Phantoms do not spawn for you. |
| You don't have hunger and are immune to poison. | Villagers will run from you and iron golems intermediately attack you. |
| You increase the spawn rate of nearby spawners. | You will burn in the sunlight. |
| Common mobs will not attack you without being provoked. | If you punch villagers, they will turn into zombie villagers. (could go either way, IMHO) |
